label: CurbClass Invoice Ninja Sync
info: Invoice Ninja Webhook -> Twenty CRM sync & client reconciliation

nodes.name: Process Ninja Webhook
Prepare Search Person
Process Client Search
Prepare Search Client for Invoice
Process Invoice Mapping
Update Opportunity Stage
Prepare Invoice Note
Prepare Search Client for Quote
Process Quote Mapping
Update Opportunity Stage (Quote)
Prepare Quote Note
Prepare Note Duplicate Check
Skip if Note Exists
Reconcile Invoice Ninja Client IDs (30 min)
Prepare Fetch Ninja Clients
Process Ninja Clients Page
Backfill Ninja Client ID if Missing
Prepare Invoice Ninja Client
Prepare Twenty Person Update
💳 Invoice Ninja Webhook -> Twenty CRM Sync
nodes.info: Receives invoice, client, and payment webhooks from Invoice Ninja and reconciles them with Twenty CRM records (creates/updates clients, notes payments, updates opportunity stages, and sets tasks).

nodes.name: 📝 Invoice Ninja Inbound Webhook Sync
nodes.info:
Listens for webhook triggers from Invoice Ninja when client, quote, or invoice events occur.

Resolves the matching Twenty CRM client, updates the corresponding CRM Opportunity stage, and creates rich notes documenting the invoice status.

nodes.name: 📝 CRM-InvoiceNinja ID Reconciliation
nodes.info:
Runs automatically every 30 minutes. Fetches clients from Invoice Ninja and searches Twenty CRM for people with matching emails.

If a person is found in the CRM but lacks an Invoice Ninja Client ID reference, it backfills the field to ensure reliable future synchronizations.

nodes.name: 📝 Automatic Client Provisioning Flow
nodes.info:
Called via a Link Call node during the lead ingestion pipeline when a new lead is processed.

Provisions a new client record in Invoice Ninja, retrieves the client ID, and updates the CRM Person record with this ID so invoices can be issued later.
